# Transcrição: 11. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - THIS PRODUCTS SAYS YOU ARE A SUCCESS

- **Fonte:** 11. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - THIS PRODUCTS SAYS YOU ARE A SUCCESS
- **Duração:** 00:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:15]

You just heard, I don't think I can afford it. Look, it would be a shame to see you pass on this investment. It makes such a powerful statement about who you are. This product says you're a success and you deserve it. You want it in your name, your company's name or both.
